evals.prompt: 把这个飞书文档接入 VSCode 预览：https://example.feishu.cn/docx/ABC123
evals.expected_output: Agent checks lark-cli auth, scaffolds or reuses the local preview workflow, configures the provided doc URL, syncs Markdown, renders HTML, and tells the user how to open the VSCode preview.

evals.prompt: 我本地改了 feishu-docs/current.md，帮我写回飞书
evals.expected_output: Agent previews the remote overwrite target and revision first, explains the risk, and only runs the confirmed push command after explicit user confirmation.

evals.prompt: 飞书授权失效了，帮我重新连一下
evals.expected_output: Agent runs lark-cli auth status, starts the recommended login flow if needed, displays the verification URL and QR code, then resumes after the user authorizes.
